sentence_reviews.text: An encoder–decoder transformer builds a bidirectional source representation and generates a target sequence through cross-attention and causal decoding.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, cross-attention, masking, and autoregressive decoding.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited node/reference evidence directly supports the architecture description at this level of specificity.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Encoder–decoder transformers is to connect Transformers, Cross-attention & co-attention to downstream capabilities including Speech recognition & spoken-language understanding.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer encoder-decoder architecture, cross-attention, masking, and autoregressive decoding.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependency portion is supported, but the downstream capability list is graph-derived and not fully established by the cited packet sources.
